data.acceptance:
1. A new integration test job in CI installs `age` (apt or release tarball), generates an identity, runs the full lifecycle: init → set → list → render → recipient add → recipient remove, and asserts the rendered plaintext matches what was set.
2. Tests are tagged `//go:build integration` so they don't slow the unit-test job.
3. Job runs on at least Ubuntu; ideally macOS too.
